deck.name: Veloci-Ramp-Tor precon
deck.description: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander Precon Decklist
deck.mulliganGuidelines: a good starting hand usually has at least 3 land and at least 1 ramp
deck.strategyGuidelines: try to get the commander out as early as possible then prioritize playing dinosaurs after

openingHandLlmRuns.summary: Kept the initial 7-card hand with 0 mulligans. The hand has 3 lands, early green mana, castable early acceleration in Drover of the Mighty, and a reasonable Dinosaur curve with Dinosaur Egg, Sunfrill Imitator, and Regisaur Alpha. No cards were bottomed.

outputPayload.message: Drew 1 card(s) from the top. 91 card(s) remain.

precombat_main: Played *Secluded Courtyard*, choosing Dinosaur as it entered.

untap: Untapped *Secluded Courtyard* and *Forest*; *Drover of the Mighty* is no longer summoning sick.
precombat_main: Played *Plains* as the land for turn.
Tapped *Secluded Courtyard* for {R}, spending it only to cast a Dinosaur creature spell; tapped *Forest* for {G}.
Spent {1}{R} to cast *Marauding Raptor*.
Tapped *Drover of the Mighty* for {G}.
Spent {G} to cast *Dinosaur Egg*, reduced by *Marauding Raptor* from {1}{G} to {G}.
*Marauding Raptor* triggered and dealt 2 damage to *Dinosaur Egg*; because a Dinosaur was dealt damage this way, *Marauding Raptor* got +2/+0 until end of turn.
end_step_cleanup: Damage marked on *Dinosaur Egg* was removed; *Marauding Raptor*'s +2/+0 effect ended.

data.reason: Ripjaw Raptor enrage trigger draws a card after Marauding Raptor deals damage to it

outputPayload.message: Drew 1 card(s) from the top. 86 card(s) remain.

untap: Untapped *Secluded Courtyard*, *Forest*, and *Drover of the Mighty*.
combat: Attacked opponentA with *Marauding Raptor* and *Dinosaur Egg*.
*Marauding Raptor* dealt 6 combat damage and *Dinosaur Egg* dealt 2 combat damage to opponentA.
precombat_main: Tapped *Secluded Courtyard* for {R} restricted to Dinosaur creature spells, tapped *Forest* for {G}, tapped *Plains* for {W}, and tapped *Drover of the Mighty* for {1}.
Spent {1}{R}{G}{W} to cast *Pantlaza, Sun-Favored* from the command zone; *Marauding Raptor* reduced the cost by {1}.
*Dinosaur Egg*'s evolve triggered from *Pantlaza, Sun-Favored* entering and put a +1/+1 counter on *Dinosaur Egg*.
*Marauding Raptor* dealt 2 damage to *Pantlaza, Sun-Favored* and got +2/+0 until end of turn because a Dinosaur was dealt damage this way.
Resolved *Pantlaza, Sun-Favored*'s discover 4 trigger, exiling *Mountain*, *Zacama, Primal Calamity*, then *Ripjaw Raptor*.
Cast *Ripjaw Raptor* without paying its mana cost from discover; put *Mountain* and *Zacama, Primal Calamity* on the bottom of the library in a random order.
*Dinosaur Egg*'s evolve triggered from *Ripjaw Raptor* entering and put a +1/+1 counter on *Dinosaur Egg*.
*Marauding Raptor* dealt 2 damage to *Ripjaw Raptor* and got +2/+0 until end of turn because a Dinosaur was dealt damage this way.
*Ripjaw Raptor*'s enrage trigger resolved and drew *Forest*.
Played *Forest* as the land for turn.
end_step_cleanup: Damage marked on creatures and temporary +4/+0 on *Marauding Raptor* expired.
